blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt head to San Siro — Norwegian football holds its breath
Barcelona demolished Levante 3-0 on Sunday; Arsenal destroyed Spurs 4-1. A quiet Monday gives way to a Champions League week that could define Norwegian football forever.

blocks.label: 🏆 Champions League this week
items: ⚽ Tue 18:45 — Atlético Madrid vs Club Brugge — all square, Atlético must win at home
⚽ Wed 21:00 — PSG vs Monaco — French derby on a knife-edge, 3-2 on aggregate
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Benfica — holders guard a narrow lead at the Bernabéu
